name: Utano Tadano
description: **Height**: 162 cm (5'3") One of the song instructors along with Daga Iketeru. Her name is a pun meaning "Just a singer". Former washed up pop idol, then cover singer, then Jazz singer at a nightclub. She graduated from an elite music school, but because of bad luck or poor timing, her career got unstable. She's been living together with her comedian boyfriend for 6 years and constantly talks about marriage.

name: Yuuko Kouzuki
description: __Height:__ 174 cm (5' 9") __Nationality:__ Japanese __Affiliation:__ Hakuryo Hiiragi, Imperial Japanese University, United Nations Army __Rank:__ Deputy Commander Physics teacher at Hakuryo Hiiragi. Yuuko is a genius in her field, but was shut out by learned society because of her anti-authoritarian behavior. So she decided to become a teacher along with Marimo, her best friend. In her free time, she works on a theory related to quantum mechanics. A person who loves fun more than anything, she

name: Akane Segawa
description: A petite twin-tailed blonde classmate, she despises otakus and scolds Hideki whenever he acts like one or tries to interact with her. However, she is actually a gamer herself under the moniker Schwein (シュヴァイン, Shuvain), a male knight (sword dancer). Her character name is German for pig, which she did not know until Kyo informs her offline, much to her chagrin. Although she is popular at school, she has turned down many boys so she can have more gaming time. (Source: Wikipedia)

description: **Height:** 158 cm (5′2″) Akari is seen as a beautiful and gentle person. She has a positive personality, trying to make the best of a situation. It surprisingly morphs into a motherly personality around her friends, comforting them when they are heartbroken or being their cheer squad in the background when it comes down to their hopes for the future. name: Asa Shigure
description: **Height:** 163 cm Asa Shigure is Rin's friend and senpai. While she has a weak constitution, she makes up for it with her energetic personality. Despite being a touch of a tomboy, she is an excellent cook. She uses English loan words often and is notable for her "Hello!" greeting which is her catchphrase. ~!Asa has a mother that is literally a demon, but ironically she is probably the nicest character in the show. name: Astraea
description: __Height__: 159cm __Species__: Angeloid Introduced as the "Delta Angeloid: Close Combat Type". name: Atom Tetsuwan
description: The android boy fashioned after Tobio Tenma (Astor Boynton III in the B/W American translation) by his father, the head of the Institute of Science in the year 2000. Aside from possessing the strength of 100,000 horsepower (later 1,000,000) and the kind personality of a child, he has what are called his "seven amazing powers": jet-powered flight, multilingualism, analytical skills, headlight eyes, super-sensitive hearing, hidden weapons in his back and the ability to tell if a person's good or e

name: Benten
description: Benten is a magical human living in Kyoto. When she was younger, she was abducted by Akadama-sensei, an elder tengu. As she grew, he taught her the ways of tengu and how to fly. ~!After parting with Akadama-sensei, she joins the Friday Fellows and captures her first tanuki that is Yasaburo's father. She mourns the fact that she will have to eat Yasaburo because of her love for him.!~

name: Haru
description: Haru has blonde hair, purple eyes and long eyelashes, and is very cheerful and charismatic. He was a transfer student along with Yuki, and introduces himself as an alien, which people think is a joke due to his enthusiastic behavior, although there are some indicts that may prove it true. He is seen carrying a fish in a fish bowl on his head, who refers to Haru as "brother". When upset with people's actions, he shoots them with a bright green water pistol, making it possible for him to briefly c

name: Hikari Hanazono
description: Hikari is determined to beat Kei in any kind of competition, whether it be in organizing a school event or a wrestling match. She's a kind girl who always worries whether others are having fun. She is second place in 10th grade for best grades, but is sometimes lacking in common sense. Stubborn, proud, and hot-headed, Hikari never backs down from a challenge, especially one from Kei, as she is constantly looking for an opportunity to surpass him. She's good at everything except for cooking and t

name: Hiyuki Kagari
description: She is stated to be the 'strongest fighter of the Kamunabi', 'the only individual capable of opposing an Enchanted Blade' and wields the Flame Bone of the Starving, which is said to hold strength on par with the Enchanted Blades.

name: Kanata Shinkai
description: __Unit:__ RYUSEITAI __Club:__ Marine Bio Club __Circles:__ OCEANS, Mystery Researchers An idol who loves the ocean, and is searching for his own way to live as a human being. He has a calm and carefree personality, and his home is the aquarium. He physically feels suffocated without water. With a softly swaying singing voice, his performances are relaxed. Mild-mannered and mysterious, Kanata is one of the "Three Oddballs." The teachers often keep a close watch on him since his eccentric behavior

name: Kansatsu-sha
description: The mysterious being and observer who cast the orb onto the Earth. His goal is to preserve the world. He sent Fushi to acquire various kinds of information from the world and aid his observations.

name: Kazuma Mikura
description: Team- Kogarasumaru Status- Flame King Road- Flame Road known as Kazu to his friends, is a childhood friend of Ikki who becomes influenced to take up AT and join Kogarasumaru. He is originally bullied by Ikki as a child, and he often feels like others are more important than himself, especially compared to Ikki's natural talent. In the manga, Kazu owns a dog named Chiwa. He takes up running at a later point, which eventually leads to him being an exceptionally fast AT rider. As he shows signs of

name: Komugi Inukai
description: Inukai Komugi is the main protagonist of Wonderful Precure! Komugi's true form is of a Papillon dog; however she can transform into a human. She is the leader of the group alongside her owner [Inukai Iroha](https://anilist.co/character/323116/Iroha-Inukai). Komugi is full of curiosity, and is a glutton. She is athletic, and loves going for walks.

name: Kubera Leez

name: Masato Hijirikawa

Several years ago on a snowy day while Masato was troubled and in despair over the pressure of becoming his family's heir he happened on a girl singing with a group of children. name: Nagisa Momoe
description: A magical girl who wished for a cheesecake that her mother would think was the best. Nagisa is usually rather childish, serving as the plucky and cheerful comic relief of the group, though she's shown to be more perceptive than she seems. She tends to speak rather eloquently. name: Natsuo Maki
description: __Height:__ 154 cm The Student Council President, who has a polite and calm demeanor. She is admired by Riko's classmates.

name: Obey Your Master
description: An Uma Musume representing America. She is lively and cheerful, with a lighthearted vibe but also an air of mystery around her. She has no notable race record and no G1 victories.

name: Rimi Sakihata
description: Rimi is one of the main characters in ChaoS;HEAd and is the main female protaganist.

name: Sangaku Manami
description: Manami is most distinctively characterised by two things: his love for slopes, and his desire to feel alive. This stems from his childhood as sickly and bedridden, in which he played video games to pass time but disliked them, yearning to feel the pain he sustained in-game as proof he was alive.
